utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Nothing ! It is over ! Dammit ! This is regularly scheduled programming !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Can we turn the TV off ? Okay ? Do we really want to spend the entire weekend like this ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , I am sorry , am I getting in the way of all the room switching fun ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_am I getting in the way of all the room switching fun ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey , do not blame me for wigging tonight !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , who should I blame ? The nice bell man who had to drag out luggage to 10 different rooms ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_do not blame me for wigging tonight !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I do not know , how about the idiot who thought he could drive from Albany to Canada on a half a tank of gas !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Do not speak ill of the dead .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: We are supposed to uh , be spending a romantic weekend together , it ... it , what is the matter with you ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I just want to watch a little television . What is the big deal ? Geez , relax mom .

emotion_cause.span: 10_I just want to watch a little television .
